---
description: "Dispatch the drift-auditor agent to cross-reference spec/product/ with src/ and report drift. Returns a punch-list of spec/code mismatches."
agent: agent
tools: [read, search]
---

Use the `drift-auditor` agent to run the workflow defined in
[`spec/engineering/workflows/spec-check.md`](../../spec/engineering/workflows/spec-check.md).

Return its report verbatim.
